---
title: "Elastic Net"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(glmnet)
library(dplyr)
library(pROC)
library(PRROC)
library(ModelMetrics)
library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
```

# STDB

```{r}
stdb_rf <- read_tsv('results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')
stdb_gb <- read_tsv('../GB/tuning/results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')

stdb_merged <- stdb_rf %>%
  bind_cols(
    stdb_gb %>% select(-any_of(names(stdb_rf)))
  )

df2 <- stdb_merged %>%
  select(-sample)   # drop the sample ID

# make sure y is numeric 0/1
# if y is already 0/1 numeric, this is safe. 
# if it's a factor with levels 0 and 1, this also works.
df2$y <- as.numeric(df2$y)

```

```{r}
# design matrix (all columns except y)
x <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = df2)[, -1]  # drop intercept column
y_vec <- df2$y

set.seed(123)

cv_en <- cv.glmnet(
  x      = x,
  y      = y_vec,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha  = 0.5,    # elastic net; change if you want
  nfolds = 5
)

# choose lambda (min = best fit, 1se = more regularized)
#lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.min
lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.1se

p_hat <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

png("final_plots/stdb_elastic_net_lambda.png",   # output filename
    width  = 2000,          # pixels
    height = 1600,
    res    = 200)           # DPI (200–300 is typical for thesis-quality)

plot(cv_en)                  # <-- produces the cv.glmnet plot

dev.off()                    # closes the PNG device
```

```{r}
# ROC object from pROC
roc_obj <- pROC::roc(response = y_vec, predictor = p_hat, quiet = TRUE)

# ROC AUC from pROC (explicit)
roc_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))

# Average Precision / PR AUC from PRROC
pr_obj <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat[y_vec == 1],  # scores for positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat[y_vec == 0],  # scores for negatives
  curve = FALSE
)

ap <- pr_obj$auc.integral
ap
roc_auc
```

```{r}
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

results <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {

  # class predictions
  y_pred <- ifelse(p_hat >= th, 1, 0)
  
  # confusion matrix components
  tp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 1)
  
  # metrics
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  # MCC using probabilities + cutoff
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_vec,
    predicted = p_hat,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc
  )
})

results_df <- bind_rows(results)
```

# Validation

```{r}
#val <- read_tsv('validation/results/iteration1/inputs/validation_input.txt')

# val_full <- val

common_cols <- intersect(names(val_full), names(df2))

val <- val_full %>% select(all_of(common_cols))

# make sure y is numeric 0/1 (same coding as training)
val$y <- as.numeric(val$y)

# model.matrix with same formula
x_val <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = val)[, -1]

# ensure same columns and order as training matrix x
x_val <- x_val[, colnames(x), drop = FALSE]
```

```{r}
p_hat_val <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x_val, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

# ROC AUC on validation
roc_obj_val <- pROC::roc(response = y_val, predictor = p_hat_val, quiet = TRUE)
roc_auc_val <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj_val))

# Average Precision on validation
pr_obj_val <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat_val[y_val == 1],  # positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat_val[y_val == 0],  # negatives
  curve = FALSE
)
ap_val <- pr_obj_val$auc.integral
```

```{r}
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

val_results <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {
  # hard predictions at this threshold
  y_pred_val <- ifelse(p_hat_val >= th, 1, 0)
  
  # confusion matrix components
  tp <- sum(y_pred_val == 1 & y_val == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred_val == 0 & y_val == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred_val == 1 & y_val == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred_val == 0 & y_val == 1)
  
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  # MCC on validation using probabilities + cutoff
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_val,
    predicted = p_hat_val,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap_val,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc_val
  )
})

val_results_df <- bind_rows(val_results)

write_tsv(val_results_df, 'stdb_only_EN.txt')
```

# STDB GB

```{r}
df <- read_tsv('../GB/tuning/results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')

df2 <- df %>%
  select(-sample)   # drop the sample ID

# make sure y is numeric 0/1
# if y is already 0/1 numeric, this is safe. 
# if it's a factor with levels 0 and 1, this also works.
df2$y <- as.numeric(df2$y)

```

```{r}
# design matrix (all columns except y)
x <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = df2)[, -1]  # drop intercept column
y_vec <- df2$y

set.seed(123)

cv_en <- cv.glmnet(
  x      = x,
  y      = y_vec,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha  = 0.5,    # elastic net; change if you want
  nfolds = 5
)

# choose lambda (min = best fit, 1se = more regularized)
#lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.min
lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.1se

p_hat <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

plot(cv_en)
```

```{r}
# ROC object from pROC
roc_obj <- pROC::roc(response = y_vec, predictor = p_hat, quiet = TRUE)

# ROC AUC from pROC (explicit)
roc_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))

# Average Precision / PR AUC from PRROC
pr_obj <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat[y_vec == 1],  # scores for positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat[y_vec == 0],  # scores for negatives
  curve = FALSE
)

ap <- pr_obj$auc.integral
ap
roc_auc
```

```{r}
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

results <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {

  # class predictions
  y_pred <- ifelse(p_hat >= th, 1, 0)
  
  # confusion matrix components
  tp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 1)
  
  # metrics
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  # MCC using probabilities + cutoff
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_vec,
    predicted = p_hat,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc
  )
})

results_df <- bind_rows(results)
```

# Validation

```{r}
val <- read_tsv('../GB/tuning/validation/results/feature_selection/inputs/validation_input.txt')

val2 <- val %>%
  select(-sample)   # drop sample ID to match df2

# make sure y is numeric 0/1 (same coding as training)
val2$y <- as.numeric(val2$y)

y_val <- val2$y

# model.matrix with same formula
x_val <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = val2)[, -1]

# ensure same columns and order as training matrix x
x_val <- x_val[, colnames(x), drop = FALSE]
```

```{r}
p_hat_val <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x_val, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

# ROC AUC on validation
roc_obj_val <- pROC::roc(response = y_val, predictor = p_hat_val, quiet = TRUE)
roc_auc_val <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj_val))

# Average Precision on validation
pr_obj_val <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat_val[y_val == 1],  # positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat_val[y_val == 0],  # negatives
  curve = FALSE
)
ap_val <- pr_obj_val$auc.integral
```

```{r}
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

val_results <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {
  # hard predictions at this threshold
  y_pred_val <- ifelse(p_hat_val >= th, 1, 0)
  
  # confusion matrix components
  tp <- sum(y_pred_val == 1 & y_val == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred_val == 0 & y_val == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred_val == 1 & y_val == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred_val == 0 & y_val == 1)
  
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  # MCC on validation using probabilities + cutoff
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_val,
    predicted = p_hat_val,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap_val,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc_val
  )
})

val_results_df <- bind_rows(val_results)
```

# TB RF

```{r}
tb_rf <- read_tsv('../../../TB/tuning_RF/results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')
tb_gb <- read_tsv('../../../TB/GB/tuning/results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')

tb_merged <- tb_rf %>%
  bind_cols(
    tb_gb %>% select(-any_of(names(tb_rf)))
  )

df2 <- tb_merged %>%
  select(-sample)   # drop the sample ID

# make sure y is numeric 0/1
# if y is already 0/1 numeric, this is safe. 
# if it's a factor with levels 0 and 1, this also works.
df2$y <- as.numeric(df2$y)

```

```{r}
# design matrix (all columns except y)
x <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = df2)[, -1]  # drop intercept column
y_vec <- df2$y

set.seed(123)

cv_en <- cv.glmnet(
  x      = x,
  y      = y_vec,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha  = 0.5,    # elastic net; change if you want
  nfolds = 5
)

# choose lambda (min = best fit, 1se = more regularized)
#lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.min
lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.1se

p_hat <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

png("final_plots/tb_elastic_net_lambda.png",   # output filename
    width  = 2000,          # pixels
    height = 1600,
    res    = 200)           # DPI (200–300 is typical for thesis-quality)

plot(cv_en)                  # <-- produces the cv.glmnet plot

dev.off()                    # closes the PNG device
```

```{r}
# ROC object from pROC
roc_obj <- pROC::roc(response = y_vec, predictor = p_hat, quiet = TRUE)

# ROC AUC from pROC (explicit)
roc_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))

# Average Precision / PR AUC from PRROC
pr_obj <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat[y_vec == 1],  # scores for positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat[y_vec == 0],  # scores for negatives
  curve = FALSE
)

ap <- pr_obj$auc.integral
ap
roc_auc
```

```{r}
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

results <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {

  # class predictions
  y_pred <- ifelse(p_hat >= th, 1, 0)
  
  # confusion matrix components
  tp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 1)
  
  # metrics
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  # MCC using probabilities + cutoff
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_vec,
    predicted = p_hat,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc
  )
})

results_df <- bind_rows(results)
```

# Validation

```{r}
val <- read_tsv('../../../TB/tuning_RF/validation/results/iteration1/inputs/validation_input.txt')

val_full <- val

common_cols <- intersect(names(val_full), names(df2))

val <- val_full %>% select(all_of(common_cols))

# make sure y is numeric 0/1 (same coding as training)
val$y <- as.numeric(val$y)

y_val <- val$y

# model.matrix with same formula
x_val <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = val)[, -1]

# ensure same columns and order as training matrix x
x_val <- x_val[, colnames(x), drop = FALSE]
```

```{r}
p_hat_val <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x_val, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

# ROC AUC on validation
roc_obj_val <- pROC::roc(response = y_val, predictor = p_hat_val, quiet = TRUE)
roc_auc_val <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj_val))

# Average Precision on validation
pr_obj_val <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat_val[y_val == 1],  # positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat_val[y_val == 0],  # negatives
  curve = FALSE
)
ap_val <- pr_obj_val$auc.integral
```

```{r}
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

val_results <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {
  # hard predictions at this threshold
  y_pred_val <- ifelse(p_hat_val >= th, 1, 0)
  
  # confusion matrix components
  tp <- sum(y_pred_val == 1 & y_val == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred_val == 0 & y_val == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred_val == 1 & y_val == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred_val == 0 & y_val == 1)
  
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  # MCC on validation using probabilities + cutoff
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_val,
    predicted = p_hat_val,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap_val,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc_val
  )
})

val_results_df <- bind_rows(val_results)

write_tsv(val_results_df, 'tb_only_EN.txt')
```

# TB GB

```{r}
df <- read_tsv('../../../TB/GB/tuning/results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')

df2 <- df %>%
  select(-sample)   # drop the sample ID

# make sure y is numeric 0/1
# if y is already 0/1 numeric, this is safe. 
# if it's a factor with levels 0 and 1, this also works.
df2$y <- as.numeric(df2$y)

```

```{r}
# design matrix (all columns except y)
x <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = df2)[, -1]  # drop intercept column
y_vec <- df2$y

set.seed(123)

cv_en <- cv.glmnet(
  x      = x,
  y      = y_vec,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha  = 0.5,    # elastic net; change if you want
  nfolds = 5
)

# choose lambda (min = best fit, 1se = more regularized)
#lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.min
lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.1se

p_hat <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

plot(cv_en)
```

```{r}
# ROC object from pROC
roc_obj <- pROC::roc(response = y_vec, predictor = p_hat, quiet = TRUE)

# ROC AUC from pROC (explicit)
roc_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))

# Average Precision / PR AUC from PRROC
pr_obj <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat[y_vec == 1],  # scores for positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat[y_vec == 0],  # scores for negatives
  curve = FALSE
)

ap <- pr_obj$auc.integral
ap
roc_auc
```

```{r}
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

results <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {

  # class predictions
  y_pred <- ifelse(p_hat >= th, 1, 0)
  
  # confusion matrix components
  tp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 1)
  
  # metrics
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  # MCC using probabilities + cutoff
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_vec,
    predicted = p_hat,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc
  )
})

results_df <- bind_rows(results)
```

# Validation

```{r}
val <- read_tsv('../../../TB/GB/tuning/validation/results/feature_selection/inputs/validation_input.txt')

val2 <- val %>%
  select(-sample)   # drop sample ID to match df2

# make sure y is numeric 0/1 (same coding as training)
val2$y <- as.numeric(val2$y)

y_val <- val2$y

# model.matrix with same formula
x_val <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = val2)[, -1]

# ensure same columns and order as training matrix x
x_val <- x_val[, colnames(x), drop = FALSE]
```

```{r}
p_hat_val <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x_val, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

# ROC AUC on validation
roc_obj_val <- pROC::roc(response = y_val, predictor = p_hat_val, quiet = TRUE)
roc_auc_val <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj_val))

# Average Precision on validation
pr_obj_val <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat_val[y_val == 1],  # positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat_val[y_val == 0],  # negatives
  curve = FALSE
)
ap_val <- pr_obj_val$auc.integral
```

```{r}
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

val_results <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {
  # hard predictions at this threshold
  y_pred_val <- ifelse(p_hat_val >= th, 1, 0)
  
  # confusion matrix components
  tp <- sum(y_pred_val == 1 & y_val == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred_val == 0 & y_val == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred_val == 1 & y_val == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred_val == 0 & y_val == 1)
  
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  # MCC on validation using probabilities + cutoff
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_val,
    predicted = p_hat_val,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap_val,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc_val
  )
})

val_results_df <- bind_rows(val_results)
```

# CB RF

```{r}
df <- read_tsv('../../../Combined_Breeds/tuning/results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')

df2 <- df %>%
  select(-sample)   # drop the sample ID

# make sure y is numeric 0/1
# if y is already 0/1 numeric, this is safe. 
# if it's a factor with levels 0 and 1, this also works.
df2$y <- as.numeric(df2$y)

```

```{r}
# design matrix (all columns except y)
x <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = df2)[, -1]  # drop intercept column
y_vec <- df2$y

set.seed(123)

cv_en <- cv.glmnet(
  x      = x,
  y      = y_vec,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha  = 0.5,    # elastic net; change if you want
  nfolds = 5
)

# choose lambda (min = best fit, 1se = more regularized)
#lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.min
lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.1se

p_hat <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

png("rf_en_combined.png",   # output filename
    width  = 2000,          # pixels
    height = 1600,
    res    = 200)           # DPI (200–300 is typical for thesis-quality)

plot(cv_en)                  # <-- produces the cv.glmnet plot

dev.off()                    # closes the PNG device
```

```{r}
# ROC object from pROC
roc_obj <- pROC::roc(response = y_vec, predictor = p_hat, quiet = TRUE)

# ROC AUC from pROC (explicit)
roc_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))

# Average Precision / PR AUC from PRROC
pr_obj <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat[y_vec == 1],  # scores for positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat[y_vec == 0],  # scores for negatives
  curve = FALSE
)

ap <- pr_obj$auc.integral
ap
roc_auc
```

```{r}
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

results <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {

  # class predictions
  y_pred <- ifelse(p_hat >= th, 1, 0)
  
  # confusion matrix components
  tp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 1)
  
  # metrics
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  # MCC using probabilities + cutoff
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_vec,
    predicted = p_hat,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc
  )
})

results_df <- bind_rows(results)
```

# Validation

```{r}
val <- read_tsv('../../../Combined_Breeds/tuning/validation/results/feature_selection/inputs/validation_input.txt')

val2 <- val %>%
  select(-sample)   # drop sample ID to match df2

# make sure y is numeric 0/1 (same coding as training)
val2$y <- as.numeric(val2$y)

y_val <- val2$y

# model.matrix with same formula
x_val <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = val2)[, -1]

# ensure same columns and order as training matrix x
x_val <- x_val[, colnames(x), drop = FALSE]
```

```{r}
p_hat_val <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x_val, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

# ROC AUC on validation
roc_obj_val <- pROC::roc(response = y_val, predictor = p_hat_val, quiet = TRUE)
roc_auc_val <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj_val))

# Average Precision on validation
pr_obj_val <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat_val[y_val == 1],  # positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat_val[y_val == 0],  # negatives
  curve = FALSE
)
ap_val <- pr_obj_val$auc.integral
```

```{r}
# indices for each group
idx0 <- val2$stdb == 0
idx1 <- val2$stdb == 1

# outcomes + probs for each group
y_val0      <- y_val[idx0]
p_hat_val0  <- p_hat_val[idx0]

y_val1      <- y_val[idx1]
p_hat_val1  <- p_hat_val[idx1]

library(pROC)
library(PRROC)

## STDB = 0
if (length(unique(y_val0)) >= 2) {
  roc0     <- pROC::roc(y_val0, p_hat_val0, quiet = TRUE)
  roc_auc0 <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc0))
  
  pr0 <- PRROC::pr.curve(
    scores.class0 = p_hat_val0[y_val0 == 1],
    scores.class1 = p_hat_val0[y_val0 == 0],
    curve = FALSE
  )
  ap0 <- pr0$auc.integral
} else {
  roc_auc0 <- NA_real_
  ap0      <- NA_real_
}

## STDB = 1
if (length(unique(y_val1)) >= 2) {
  roc1     <- pROC::roc(y_val1, p_hat_val1, quiet = TRUE)
  roc_auc1 <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc1))
  
  pr1 <- PRROC::pr.curve(
    scores.class0 = p_hat_val1[y_val1 == 1],
    scores.class1 = p_hat_val1[y_val1 == 0],
    curve = FALSE
  )
  ap1 <- pr1$auc.integral
} else {
  roc_auc1 <- NA_real_
  ap1      <- NA_real_
}

library(ModelMetrics)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

val_results_0 <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {
  y_pred0 <- ifelse(p_hat_val0 >= th, 1, 0)
  
  tp <- sum(y_pred0 == 1 & y_val0 == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred0 == 0 & y_val0 == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred0 == 1 & y_val0 == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred0 == 0 & y_val0 == 1)
  
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_val0,
    predicted = p_hat_val0,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    stdb        = 0,
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap0,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc0
  )
}) |> bind_rows()

val_results_1 <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {
  y_pred1 <- ifelse(p_hat_val1 >= th, 1, 0)
  
  tp <- sum(y_pred1 == 1 & y_val1 == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred1 == 0 & y_val1 == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred1 == 1 & y_val1 == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred1 == 0 & y_val1 == 1)
  
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_val1,
    predicted = p_hat_val1,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    stdb        = 1,
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap1,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc1
  )
}) |> bind_rows()

val_results_by_stdb <- bind_rows(val_results_0, val_results_1)

```

# CB GB

```{r}
rf_stdb <- read_tsv('results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')
gb_stdb <- read_tsv('../GB/tuning/results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')

rf_tb <- read_tsv('../../../TB/tuning_RF/results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')
gb_tb <- read_tsv('../../../TB/GB/tuning/results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')

rf_tb$pacer <- 0
gb_tb$pacer <- 0
rf_tb$trotter <- 0
gb_tb$trotter <- 0

rf_cb <- read_tsv('../../../Combined_Breeds/tuning/results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')
gb_cb <- read_tsv('../../../Combined_Breeds/GB/tuning/results/feature_selection/inputs/modeling_input.txt')
```

```{r}

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Set your ID column name here
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
id_col <- "sample"   # change this if your ID column has a different name

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Start from rf_cb and add pacer/trotter from rf_tb + rf_stdb
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
gait_info <- bind_rows(
  rf_tb   %>% select(all_of(c(id_col, "pacer", "trotter"))),
  rf_stdb %>% select(all_of(c(id_col, "pacer", "trotter")))
) %>%
  distinct(!!sym(id_col), .keep_all = TRUE)

df <- rf_cb %>%
  left_join(gait_info, by = id_col)
# Now df = rf_cb + pacer + trotter (NA where unknown)

# # -------------------------------------------------------------------
# # 3. Helper: add only truly new columns from another data frame
# # -------------------------------------------------------------------
# add_new_columns <- function(base, other, id_col) {
#   # columns that exist in 'other' but NOT yet in 'base'
#   new_cols <- setdiff(names(other), names(base))
#   # never treat the ID column itself as a "new" feature
#   new_cols <- setdiff(new_cols, id_col)
# 
#   if (length(new_cols) == 0) return(base)
# 
#   other_sub <- other %>%
#     select(all_of(c(id_col, new_cols)))
# 
#   left_join(base, other_sub, by = id_col)
# }
# 
# # -------------------------------------------------------------------
# # 4. Add new columns from the other modeling_input data frames
# # -------------------------------------------------------------------
# df_final <- df %>%
#   add_new_columns(gb_cb,   id_col) %>%
#   add_new_columns(rf_tb,   id_col) %>%
#   add_new_columns(gb_tb,   id_col) %>%
#   add_new_columns(rf_stdb, id_col) %>%
#   add_new_columns(gb_stdb, id_col)

write_tsv(df, "final_elastic_net_input.tsv")

df <- read_tsv('final_elastic_net_input.tsv')

#df_final_nm <- df_final[, colSums(is.na(df_final)) == 0]
```

```{r}
non_feature_candidates <- c(
  "sample_id", "sample", "Sample", "Sample_ID",  # any ID-ish names, only dropped if they exist
  "y",
  "stallion", "gelding", "mare",
  "pacer", "trotter",
  "stdb", "tb"
)

non_feature_cols <- intersect(non_feature_candidates, names(df))
non_feature_cols

feature_cols <- setdiff(names(df), non_feature_cols)

y_vec <- df$y

x_raw <- as.matrix(df[, feature_cols])
```

```{r}

df2 <- df %>%
  select(-sample)   # drop the sample ID

# make sure y is numeric 0/1
# if y is already 0/1 numeric, this is safe. 
# if it's a factor with levels 0 and 1, this also works.
df2$y <- as.numeric(df2$y)
```

```{r}
# design matrix (all columns except y)
x <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = df2)[, -1]  # drop intercept column
y_vec <- df2$y

set.seed(123)

cv_en <- cv.glmnet(
  x      = x,
  y      = y_vec,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha  = 0.5,    # elastic net; change if you want
  nfolds = 5
)

# choose lambda (min = best fit, 1se = more regularized)
#lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.min
lambda_star <- cv_en$lambda.1se

p_hat <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

png("final_plots/elastic_net_lambda.png",   # output filename
    width  = 2000,          # pixels
    height = 1600,
    res    = 200)           # DPI (200–300 is typical for thesis-quality)

plot(cv_en)                  # <-- produces the cv.glmnet plot

dev.off()                    # closes the PNG device
```

```{r}
# ROC object from pROC
roc_obj <- pROC::roc(response = y_vec, predictor = p_hat, quiet = TRUE)

# ROC AUC from pROC (explicit)
roc_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))

# Average Precision / PR AUC from PRROC
pr_obj <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat[y_vec == 1],  # scores for positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat[y_vec == 0],  # scores for negatives
  curve = FALSE
)

ap <- pr_obj$auc.integral
ap
roc_auc
```

```{r}
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

results <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {

  # class predictions
  y_pred <- ifelse(p_hat >= th, 1, 0)
  
  # confusion matrix components
  tp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_vec == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_vec == 1)
  
  # metrics
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  # MCC using probabilities + cutoff
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_vec,
    predicted = p_hat,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc
  )
})

results_df <- bind_rows(results)
```

# Validation

```{r}
#val <- read_tsv('../../../Combined_Breeds/tuning/validation/results/iteration1/inputs/validation_input.txt')

# val <- val %>%
#   left_join(
#     df_final_nm %>% select(sample, pacer, trotter),
#     by = "sample"
#   )
# 
# common_cols <- intersect(names(val), names(df))
# 
# val_merged <- val %>% select(all_of(common_cols))
# 
# write.table(
#   val_merged,
#   file = "val_merged.tsv",
#   sep = "\t",
#   quote = FALSE,
#   row.names = FALSE
# )

val_merged <- read_tsv('val_merged.tsv')

val2 <- val_merged %>%
  select(-sample)   # drop sample ID to match df2

# make sure y is numeric 0/1 (same coding as training)
val2$y <- as.numeric(val2$y)

y_val <- val2$y

# model.matrix with same formula
train_cols <- colnames(x)

# Which columns from training are missing in val2?
missing_in_val <- setdiff(train_cols, colnames(val2))

# Add them as 0 (e.g. homozygous reference / absent)
for (col in missing_in_val) {
  val2[[col]] <- 0
}

# ensure same columns and order as training matrix x
x_val <- as.matrix(val2[, train_cols, drop = FALSE])
```

```{r}
p_hat_val <- as.numeric(
  predict(cv_en, newx = x_val, s = lambda_star, type = "response")
)

# ROC AUC on validation
roc_obj_val <- pROC::roc(response = y_val, predictor = p_hat_val, quiet = TRUE)
roc_auc_val <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj_val))

# Average Precision on validation
pr_obj_val <- PRROC::pr.curve(
  scores.class0 = p_hat_val[y_val == 1],  # positives
  scores.class1 = p_hat_val[y_val == 0],  # negatives
  curve = FALSE
)
ap_val <- pr_obj_val$auc.integral
```

```{r}
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

val_results <- lapply(thresholds, function(th) {
  # hard predictions at this threshold
  y_pred_val <- ifelse(p_hat_val >= th, 1, 0)
  
  # confusion matrix components
  tp <- sum(y_pred_val == 1 & y_val == 1)
  tn <- sum(y_pred_val == 0 & y_val == 0)
  fp <- sum(y_pred_val == 1 & y_val == 0)
  fn <- sum(y_pred_val == 0 & y_val == 1)
  
  sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
  
  # MCC on validation using probabilities + cutoff
  mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
    actual    = y_val,
    predicted = p_hat_val,
    cutoff    = th
  )
  
  tibble(
    threshold   = th,
    sensitivity = sensitivity,
    specificity = specificity,
    MCC         = mcc_val,
    tp = tp,
    fp = fp,
    tn = tn,
    fn = fn,
    AP          = ap_val,
    ROCAUC      = roc_auc_val
  )
})

val_results_df <- bind_rows(val_results)
```

```{r}
library(ModelMetrics)

# ---- 0) Threshold grid ----
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

# ---- 1) Helper: compute metrics across thresholds for a given subgroup ----
compute_metrics <- function(y_true, p_hat, thresholds) {
  # threshold-independent metrics
  auc_val <- ModelMetrics::auc(
    actual    = y_true,
    predicted = p_hat
  )
  
  ap_val <- ModelMetrics::prauc(
    actual    = y_true,
    predicted = p_hat
  )
  
  map_dfr(thresholds, function(th) {
    # hard predictions at this threshold
    y_pred <- ifelse(p_hat >= th, 1, 0)
    
    # confusion matrix components
    tp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_true == 1)
    tn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_true == 0)
    fp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_true == 0)
    fn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_true == 1)
    
    sensitivity <- tp / (tp + fn)
    specificity <- tn / (tn + fp)
    
    mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
      actual    = y_true,
      predicted = p_hat,
      cutoff    = th
    )
    
    tibble(
      threshold   = th,
      sensitivity = sensitivity,
      specificity = specificity,
      MCC         = mcc_val,
      AP          = ap_val,
      AUROC       = auc_val,
      tp = tp,
      fp = fp,
      tn = tn,
      fn = fn
    )
  })
}

# ---- 2) Overall validation metrics (all samples) ----
val_all <- compute_metrics(
  y_true     = y_val,
  p_hat      = p_hat_val,
  thresholds = thresholds
) %>%
  mutate(group = "All")

# ---- 3) Define your STDB flag (0/1) ----
# EDIT THIS LINE to match your column name:
# e.g. if your validation df is called `val2` and the column is `stdb`:
stdb_flag <- val2$stdb   # <-- change to your actual column

# ---- 4) STDB = 0 ----
val_stdb0 <- compute_metrics(
  y_true     = y_val[stdb_flag == 0],
  p_hat      = p_hat_val[stdb_flag == 0],
  thresholds = thresholds
) %>%
  mutate(group = "STDB0")

# ---- 5) STDB = 1 ----
val_stdb1 <- compute_metrics(
  y_true     = y_val[stdb_flag == 1],
  p_hat      = p_hat_val[stdb_flag == 1],
  thresholds = thresholds
) %>%
  mutate(group = "STDB1")

# ---- 6) Combine all results ----
val_results_df <- bind_rows(val_all, val_stdb0, val_stdb1)

```

```{}
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(ModelMetrics)

# -----------------------------
# 0) Threshold grid
# -----------------------------
thresholds <- seq(0.01, 0.99, by = 0.01)

# -----------------------------
# 1) Helper: average precision (AP)
# -----------------------------
average_precision <- function(y_true, p_hat) {
  # y_true must be 0/1
  if (!any(y_true == 1) || !any(y_true == 0)) {
    return(NA_real_)  # AP undefined if only one class present
  }
  
  ord <- order(p_hat, decreasing = TRUE)
  y_true <- y_true[ord]
  
  tp <- cumsum(y_true == 1)
  fp <- cumsum(y_true == 0)
  
  precision <- tp / (tp + fp)
  recall    <- tp / sum(y_true == 1)
  
  # Compute AP as sum over recall steps: sum( (R_i - R_{i-1}) * P_i )
  ap <- 0
  prev_recall <- 0
  for (i in seq_along(recall)) {
    if (i == 1 || recall[i] != recall[i - 1]) {
      ap <- ap + precision[i] * (recall[i] - prev_recall)
      prev_recall <- recall[i]
    }
  }
  ap
}

# -----------------------------
# 2) Helper: compute metrics across thresholds for a given subgroup
# -----------------------------
compute_metrics <- function(y_true, p_hat, thresholds) {
  # if only one class present, AP and AUC are undefined
  if (length(unique(y_true)) < 2L) {
    ap_val      <- NA_real_
    roc_auc_val <- NA_real_
  } else {
    ap_val      <- average_precision(y_true, p_hat)
    roc_auc_val <- ModelMetrics::auc(actual = y_true, predicted = p_hat)
  }
  
  map_dfr(thresholds, function(th) {
    # hard predictions at this threshold
    y_pred <- ifelse(p_hat >= th, 1, 0)
    
    # confusion matrix components
    tp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_true == 1)
    tn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_true == 0)
    fp <- sum(y_pred == 1 & y_true == 0)
    fn <- sum(y_pred == 0 & y_true == 1)
    
    sensitivity <- ifelse(tp + fn > 0, tp / (tp + fn), NA_real_)
    specificity <- ifelse(tn + fp > 0, tn / (tn + fp), NA_real_)
    
    mcc_val <- ModelMetrics::mcc(
      actual    = y_true,
      predicted = p_hat,
      cutoff    = th
    )
    
    tibble(
      threshold   = th,
      sensitivity = sensitivity,
      specificity = specificity,
      MCC         = mcc_val,
      tp = tp,
      fp = fp,
      tn = tn,
      fn = fn,
      AP     = ap_val,
      ROCAUC = roc_auc_val
    )
  })
}

# -----------------------------
# 3) Overall validation metrics (All samples)
# -----------------------------
val_all <- compute_metrics(
  y_true     = y_val,
  p_hat      = p_hat_val,
  thresholds = thresholds
) %>%
  mutate(group = "All")

# -----------------------------
# 4) STDB flag (0/1) - EDIT THIS LINE if needed
# -----------------------------
# Change `val$STDB` to your actual 0/1 indicator column name
stdb_flag <- val2$stdb

# -----------------------------
# 5) STDB = 0
# -----------------------------
val_stdb0 <- compute_metrics(
  y_true     = y_val[stdb_flag == 0],
  p_hat      = p_hat_val[stdb_flag == 0],
  thresholds = thresholds
) %>%
  mutate(group = "STDB0")

# -----------------------------
# 6) STDB = 1
# -----------------------------
val_stdb1 <- compute_metrics(
  y_true     = y_val[stdb_flag == 1],
  p_hat      = p_hat_val[stdb_flag == 1],
  thresholds = thresholds
) %>%
  mutate(group = "STDB1")

# -----------------------------
# 7) Combine all results
# -----------------------------
val_results_df <- bind_rows(val_all, val_stdb0, val_stdb1)


```

# Coefficients

```{r}
# Extract coefficients at lambda.1se
beta <- coef(cv_en, s = "lambda.1se")  # returns a sparse matrix

coef_df <- beta %>%
  as.matrix() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  rename(coef = 2) %>%
  as_tibble()

# Remove intercept
coef_df <- coef_df %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)")76

covariate_terms <- c(
  "stdb", "tb",          # breed indicators
  "stallion", "gelding", "mare",   # sex indicators
  "pacer", "trotter"     # gait indicators
)

# covariate_terms <- c(
# "sex"
# )

# Keep all covariates, even if coef is 0 (so you can show they were shrunk out)
covars_tbl <- coef_df %>%
  filter(term %in% covariate_terms)

# Genetic predictors = everything else
variants_tbl <- coef_df %>%
  filter(!term %in% covariate_terms)

variants_nz <- variants_tbl %>%
  filter(coef != 0)

top20_variants <- variants_tbl %>%
  filter(coef != 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(coef))) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

coef_table <- bind_rows(
  covars_tbl %>% mutate(type = "Covariate"),
  top20_variants %>% mutate(type = "Variant")
) %>%
  # optional: order with covariates first, then variants by |coef|
  arrange(
    factor(type, levels = c("Covariate", "Variant")),
    desc(abs(coef))
  )

coef_table

# Extract just the variant names (terms)
variant_list <- top20_variants$term

# Write to a plain text file (one variant per line)
#writeLines(variant_list, "EN_variants.txt")

#write_csv(coef_table, "EN_coef_table_template.csv")
```

```{r}
en_df <- read_csv('EN_coef_table_template.csv')

en_df <- en_df %>%
  mutate(odds_ratio = exp(log_odds))

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(gt)

library(dplyr)
library(gt)

# 1) Clean + order table for display
coef_table_disp <- en_df %>%
  # fix any typos like "Covariatei"
  mutate(
    Type = if_else(grepl("^Covariate", Type), "Covariate", Type),
    Type = factor(Type, levels = c("Covariate", "Variant"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(Type, desc(abs(log_odds))) %>%
  # choose the display column order
  select(
    Type,
    Variable,
    log_odds,
    odds_ratio,
    gene,
    variant_effect,
    variant_impact
  )

# 2) Build a nice gt table
tbl_en <- coef_table_disp %>%
  gt() %>%
  # Row groups
  tab_row_group(
    group = "Covariates",
    rows  = Type == "Covariate"
  ) %>%
  tab_row_group(
    group = "Variants",
    rows  = Type == "Variant"
  ) %>%
  # Hide helper column
  cols_hide(columns = Type) %>%
  # Pretty labels
  cols_label(
    Variable        = "Variable",
    log_odds        = html("Log-odds (&beta;)"),
    odds_ratio      = html("OR"),
    gene            = "Gene",
    variant_effect  = "Variant effect",
    variant_impact  = "Predicted impact"
  ) %>%
  # Numeric formatting
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(log_odds, odds_ratio),
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%
  # Alignments
  cols_align(
    align   = "center",
    columns = c(log_odds, odds_ratio, gene, variant_effect, variant_impact)
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align   = "left",
    columns = Variable
  ) %>%
  # Bold column labels
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) %>%
  # Bold the row-group headers (Covariates / Variants)
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  # General styling
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(14),
    data_row.padding = px(5),
    row.striping.background_color = "#f7f7f7",
    row.striping.include_table_body = TRUE
  ) |>
    fmt_missing(
    columns = everything(),
    missing_text = "–"
  )

tbl_en



gtsave(
  data = tbl_en,
  filename = "final_plots/elastic_net_coefficients_table.html"
)
```
